creator: jhein@symmetricom.com
text:
Tilman Keskinöz wrote at 15:54 +0100 on Feb 27, 2012:
 > I managed to extract the patch, but it does not apply, even after i
 > removed the windows line endings.
 > 
 > Can you resend it?

Unfortunately, you can't strip all CR line endings.  The original
Jamrules has a mix of CR & non-CR line endings.  Another approach
might be to use "tr -d '\r'" for Jamrules in pre-patch, then the
files/patch-Jamrules need not have CRs.  I haven't tried it or checked
to see if there are CRs not at line endings that should not be removed
(I doubt it, but I haven't checked).

But here is the patch again as a text/x-patch attachment.
